pi_items.source: Task setup script and install script.
Independent computation in Python (statsmodels) and R (glm) on ExamAnxiety.csv with binomial logistic regression predicting Passed (Exam >= 50) from Revise and Anxiety.
Verifier logic checks absolute difference against this value.
Independent computation in Python (statsmodels) and R (glm) on ExamAnxiety.csv.
Verifier logic checks absolute difference against this value.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic 'ExamAnxiety.csv' textbook dataset. The ground-truth model results for a binomial logistic regression predicting a computed 'Passed' variable (Exam >= 50) from 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' yield an AIC of approximately 115.8 (contradicting the task.json expected AIC of 88.4) and an Odds Ratio for Anxiety of approximately 0.9485 (contradicting the task.json expected OR of 0.875). The final Jamovi workspace must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamPass_LogReg.omv' and results must be exported to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/model_results.txt'.
